action: Wire repository file discovery and source commit identity into the deterministic queue reconciler, then verify and publish a generated current-view artifact in CI without replacing historical sources.

progress.verification: GitHub accepted and committed the generator, workflow, and evidence. Runtime workflow and uploaded artifact remain unverified until a completed Actions run is available.

privacy_boundary: Public repository metadata and abstract operational state only; no private chat, health, pet-health, credentials, contact data, or unreviewed uploads.
handoff: Inspect the first Continuity Queue View workflow run and artifact, then add explicit git ancestry comparison for equal-time competing records and a consumer contract that prevents generated projections from being mistaken for source-of-truth history.
